decisions.title: Approve Family Rules DAG implementation approach
decisions.context: ENG-9821 & ENG-9822 represent core infrastructure for rule evaluation with families. This is foundational for 'Embed Deeper' pillar - enabling complex multi-asset rule logic. Need architectural approval before implementation continues.

arguments.for: Unblocks family-based rule evaluation which is critical for multi-asset customers. Aligns with Canvas roadmap and Python Rules integration.
arguments.against: Adds complexity to rule engine. May need performance testing before committing to architecture.

decisions.title: Prioritize GovCloud deployment vs commercial features
decisions.context: ENG-9939 (Windmill in GovCloud), ENG-5980 (gov to klu migration), ENG-10225/10226 (FedRAMP compliance) require focused effort. Need to decide resource allocation vs Explore V2 timeline.

arguments.for: GovCloud represents new market segment and revenue stream. FedRAMP compliance is competitive moat.
arguments.against: Diverts engineering resources from core product evolution. May delay Explore V2 and Canvas enhancements.

decisions.title: Define production readiness criteria for Family Versions
decisions.context: DES-121, DES-113, DES-55 show UX work on families. ENG-9525 enables historic family versions. Multiple threads suggest families approaching GA, but no clear launch gate defined.

arguments.for: Families are foundational for multi-asset workflows. Clear criteria ensures quality launch and drives Decisions Captured metric.
arguments.against: May reveal gaps that delay launch. Feature is already in use by some customers.

decisions.title: Approve observability infrastructure investment (ENG-10175)
decisions.context: Production load testing observability gaps identified. Relates to 'Nail the Core' - system reliability and performance at scale. Investment needed but competes with feature work.

arguments.for: Critical for production reliability and customer trust. Prevents future incidents that could damage reputation.
arguments.against: Doesn't directly increase Decisions Captured. Opportunity cost vs customer-facing features.

decisions.title: Resolve UX friction in Run creation workflow (DES-163)
decisions.context: Asset-like support for Runs needed. Current workflow may be barrier to user adoption. Impacts 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' flow - if users can't easily create runs, signal processing suffers.
decisions.blockedBy: Need user research on current pain points and proposed solutions

arguments.for: Improved UX directly impacts user engagement and Decisions Captured metric. Low-hanging fruit for adoption.
arguments.against: May be addressing symptoms rather than root cause. Need data on actual user drop-off.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% of work hours). Focus time fragmented across mornings. Three 1:1s with eng leads on GovCloud trade-offs. Two decision-making sessions needed but not yet scheduled.
alerts: Only 20% focus time this week - below 30% target for strategic work
No dedicated time blocked for product strategy review before Q2 planning
Back-to-back meetings Wed PM preventing deep work on Family GA criteria
